fmiModelDescription.description: Software controller receiving normalized adaptation signals.

ScalarVariable.name: Input.Aircraft_State
ScalarVariable.description: Canonical ECS software input bundle normalized from external SSP naming.

ScalarVariable.name: Input.TLiquid
ScalarVariable.description: Canonical ECS software input bundle normalized from external SSP naming.

ScalarVariable.name: TCoolingPack.value
ScalarVariable.description: Shared scalar proxy port used for single-value SSP connectors.
